note: Previous CNS-028 thread (019d9528-3a64-7b62-be82-03aa800535bc) expired before iter-2 response received. CNS-028v2 is a fresh thread rebuilding context.

question.title: PR-B0 FAZ-B docs + schemas foundation — implementation plan v2 adversarial review (iter 1 — fresh thread)
question.body:
PR-B0 (FAZ-B Tranche B 1/9) plan v2: 4 docs + 3 data schemas + 2 policy schemas + 2 bundled policies (dormant) + 1 bundled catalog + 1 config delta + ~30 tests, ~1300 LOC, no runtime code. Context: v3.1.0 LIVE (FAZ-A komple shipped, 8 PR A0–A6, 28 Codex adversarial iter, 1524 PASS / 3 skip / 0 fail, ruff+mypy strict temiz, %85+ cov). FAZ-B master plan v2 (CNS-027 AGREE 2026-04-16 06:51): 4 hafta / 9 PR / v3.2.0.

v2 absorb (previous CNS-028 iter-1 PARTIAL): B1 claim atomicity → workspace-level claims.lock + _index.v1.json derived cache (2-lock race riski elendi); B2 fencing token persistence → _fencing.v1.json per-resource state (release claim dosyası silinir ama token state korunur, strictly monotonic never-reset); B3 price catalog → object shape {catalog_version, generated_at, source, stale_after, checksum, entries:[...]}.

8 adversarial axes: schema closed-shape discipline, policy dormant-by-default pattern, lease/fencing spec sufficiency (heartbeat-skipped → expiry race, takeover_grace_period semantics, multi-resource quota), price catalog format (vendor pricing API integration), metrics label cardinality (model + agent_id opt-in), benchmark contract (governed-review + governed-bugfix scenarios, new capability needs), B0 → B1 dependency locked-in degree, test scope (~30 tests sufficient? missing categories).

Bozulmaz ilkeler korunur: POSIX-only file_lock, CAS canonical_store pattern, fail-closed governance + fail-open evidence, 18-kind evidence taxonomy intact (B0'da ek yok), 9-state machine intact, ToolSpec.allowed=True + handler-level deny envelope.

Expected: PARTIAL iter-1 with blocking + warning, 2-4 iter convergence pattern (CNS-024/025 ancestry). Per CLAUDE.md §15 rule, MCP transport.

Repo state: branch claude/tranche-b-pr-b0 exists but HEAD=main b3b1dce (empty, no commits). Plan files untracked in main repo .claude/plans/. 0 open PR, working tree clean.
